name: CCCC Book 1
description: A Course in Contemporary Chinese (當代中文課程), Book 1 — TOCFL Band A

aunt; here a polite term for a friend's mother regardless of age

xiaolongbao, e.g., small meat and cabbage-filled steamed buns

name of a must-see place in Taipei to visit for fine tea and scenery

Chinese last name, common in Taiwan
a particle used in addressing people, especially over the phone
rent (for a room or a house)
to get settled down, to get used to

verbal particle indicating a completed action
